scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude a2ui-composer-root run test
scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach -A --topological-dev --exclude a2ui-composer-root run build
scripts.prettier: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude a2ui-composer-root run prettier
scripts.prettier:check: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude a2ui-composer-root run prettier:check
scripts.tsc: yarn --cwd shell tsc --noEmit && yarn --cwd bridge tsc --project tsconfig.bridge.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude a2ui-composer-root run clean
scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude a2ui-composer-root run lint
